creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The maintainer already submitted ports/184174 with an update to 1.12.0. 
Your patch is slightly different tough, I asked him to give a look to 
your patch too.

The port also needs to be converted to staging, which I'm trying to do, 
but it is proving a little more difficult than I thought.

I'll try to get some patch ready soon.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
